flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 41% at Moore Norman Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (363 vs 615).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Moore Norman Technology Center rose 18% between 2011 and 2013 (18.1% → 21.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Moore Norman Technology Center fell 32% between 2000 and 2003 ($1.6k → $1.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Moore Norman Technology Center rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (927 → 1.1k).
